Member Benefits
Age Benefits
Paid to all contributing members who have reached the retirement age of 55 whether in active employment or not.
Learn
                                more
Withdrawal Benefits
Paid to members on attaining the age of 50 years, if they have been out of employment for a year.
Learn
                                more
Survivors Benefits
Paid to the relatives (Spouse, children or dependent parents) of the deceased contributing member.
Learn
                                more
Invalidity Benefits
Paid to a member who has lost their earning capacity and has physical or mental incapacity, verified by an NSSF Doctor.
Learn
                                more
Exempted Benefits
Paid to contributing members who join employment categories that are excepted...
Learn
                                more
Midterm Benefits
Paid to a member who is 45 years of age and above and who has made contributions for at least 10 years
Learn
                                more
Emigration Benefits
Paid to contributing members who have been working within the country and are leaving Uganda permanently
Learn
                                more
Introducing Smartlife Flexi -  A better way to save!
Smartlife Flexi is a flexible, goal-driven savings plan designed to help you achieve your financial goals on your terms. With the freedom to choose how much you save, when you contribute, and the length of your savings period, it's as adaptable as you need it to be — all while earning a competitive monthly return, accrued daily..
Enjoy the ease of flexible deposits and the option to access your savings whenever needed. Whether you're building a rainy-day fund, planning a holiday, securing your child’s education, or saving for a new car, Smartlife Flexi offers a straightforward way to reach your goals with confidence and control.
Learn More
